race.description: Freight Lines Group Esperance Cup Handicap
race.comment: Time for the Cup now and ARCADIA KNIGHT (2) makes plenty of appeal. The rise in trip third-up is ideal for him and he's returned in good order without winning. Gets his chance now with CJP making the trip to ride him and he looks poised to strike. WILD IMAGINATION (1) has bounced back in his past couple, just missing over 1990m here last time out when leading throughout. He drops 5kg for today's assignment and gets Wheatley back in the saddle. Ticks a few boxes and will be right there at the finish. MR TALENTINO (9) was trending the right way prior to last start's disappointing effort as favourite. He can tend to throw up a poor one third-up, though, and he can bounce back to his best here. PRAY AGAIN (10) will appreciate getting back out to 2000m following a narrow defeat at Mt Barker two back. Has to be included. TRUE CHANCE (13) is building nicely this time in work and is not to be discounted despite the wide draw.
